name: Live Chat
description:
Just a reupload due to the original one by Mayu0910, is bugged and for those don't feel like messing with the settings. Dead Dove tag for the Chat being dark and no filter and explicit. An example of content would be the fake websites in WTTG/WTTG 2.

Edit: Did some reediting on the bot, hopefully it is not stopping on "Anon"... or anything after "trending".

Original Bio: "For whatever kind of sick and twisted reason, you decided to try live streaming... in the dark web. ... Or you could just try doing something else, like ghost hunting. Who knows? Maybe the audiences there would appreciate a break from all the gore streams they've traumatized themselves with 👍👍👍"
creator: KiraTakamiya
